name: I-Ciprofloxacin
description: I-Fluoroquinolone antibiotic enekhava ebanzi ye-gram-negative. Isetshenziselwa izifo zezilonda ezinzima, ukuhlukumezeka kwesisu okungena ngaphakathi (i-GI flora coverage), kanye nezifo ze-urinary tract. Itholakala i-PO ne-IV.
contraindications: Izingane kanye nentsha engaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 (isihlobo -- ingozi ye-tendinopathy)
warnings: Ingozi yokuphuka kwe-tendon, ikakhulukazi i-Achilles tendon. Yeka uma ubuhlungu be-tendon bukhula.
Ingase yelule isikhawu se-QT -- isexwayiso nezinye izidakamizwa ezandisa i-QT.
Gwema ekukhulelweni uma ezinye izindlela zikhona.

pediatric.dose: 10-20 mg/kg IV q8-12h (ubukhulu obungu-400 mg/umthamo). I-PO: 10-20 mg/kg q12h (ubukhulu obungu-750 mg/umthamo).
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa kuphela uma izinzuzo zidlula ingozi ye-tendinopathy. Igcinelwe izifo ezimbi kakhulu.

obstetric.note: Gwema ekukhulelweni uma ezinye izindlela zikhona. Sebenzisa kuphela izifo ezisongela ukuphila lapho inzuzo idlula ingozi.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Infectious Disease
